overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a forest trail during a stormy dusk. The character traverses a winding dirt path through a mountainous pine forest, passing abandoned carts and rock formations while a stream becomes visible alongside the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain forest trail with abandoned wooden cart

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path, passing a wooden cart wreckage on the left side

entered.detail: abandoned wooden cart with broken wheels sitting beside the path
steep rocky mountain slope rising on the left side of the trail
dense evergreen pine trees lining the right side of the path
winding dirt trail through the forest with patches of grass

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a stormy forest trail with Geralt walking away from the camera. An abandoned wooden cart sits on the left near the path, while a steep mountain cliff rises in the background. Tall pine trees line the right side as the character moves steadily forward along the dirt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding forest path with rock outcroppings and debris

events.description: passing a large rock boulder formation on the right side of the path
broken wagon wheel debris becomes visible on the right side of the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding path, navigating around natural rock formations and debris

entered.detail: large moss-covered rock outcropping beside the path
rusted broken wheel from an abandoned cart lying in the grass

segments.scene_description: The path winds through denser forest terrain with large rock boulders appearing on the right. The character passes by broken wagon debris scattered near the trail. The mountain cliff remains visible on the left while the surrounding pine trees shift further into the background as the camera advances.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail alongside stream with flowering undergrowth

events.description: path runs alongside a stream with water visible on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking along the path next to a forest stream, passing white flowering bushes on the right

entered.detail: narrow stream of water running parallel to the left side of the path
bushes with white blossoms lining the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The trail now runs alongside a flowing stream visible on the left, with the sound of water accompanying the footsteps. White flowering bushes bloom on the right side of the path, adding contrast to the dark stormy atmosphere. The forest becomes denser with tall pines enclosing the path as Geralt continues his journey deeper into the wilderness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a stormy forest trail that evolves from an open mountain pass into a dense, riverside wilderness. It begins with Geralt walking away from the camera past an abandoned wooden cart, with a steep mountain cliff looming in the background and tall pines lining the path. As the character advances, the trail winds through denser terrain where the cliff remains to the left while large rock boulders and scattered wagon debris appear on the right. The scene then shifts as the path begins to run alongside a flowing stream, introducing white flowering bushes that contrast with the dark, stormy atmosphere. Finally, the forest closes in with towering pines enclosing the trail as the camera follows Geralt deeper into the wilderness.
